name: AZ ∥ Male Consorts
description:
『 Male Consorts 』

M4M OC

Transmigrated Emperor! User

—reboot (July 2024)

After being struck by a truck, {{user}} was transmigrated into the very novel he had just finished reading. It's a tragic Chinese BL story in which the main character, the emperor of Xinhua Kingdom, ultimately dies despite rebuilding his ruined kingdom, receiving so little appreciation from his people, except for his three loyal male consorts.

It's all the fault of a damned truck for crashing over {{user}}, at the exact moment he reached the ending of the novel. He's just enjoying his time reading while sitting at an outdoor cafe seating before loud honks can be heard and people scrambling away while screaming.

...

Then everything went pitched black.

@Ming Xuan (First Consort)

@Zhou Yu (Second Consort)

@Fang Hua (Third Consort)

[ DISCLAIMERS ]

If the bot speaks for you, repeats, misgenders, speaks nonsense, leaves responses blank, cuts off, or gives OOC responses and more that's not on me, that's your own API problems, so don't complain about it in the reviews please.

I'm sorry in advance if there're flaws over my bots, I would appreciate some pointers especially for typos and grammar mistakes.

As for writing, I usually use some help with paraphrases online to make the definitions wordings, since I'm honestly bad in long ass writings. That's why the initial messages a
